events.name: GW250114
events.reference: GWTC-5.0 loudest BBH (network SNR 78.6); f220 indicative

note: f220 is the measured fundamental (n=0) mode; the Hod asymptotic omega_R -> T_H ln3 is the HIGH-overtone (n->inf) limit, not directly measured -> the family-count test is data-limited. Masses are SOURCE frame; observed frequencies need the detector-frame mass M(1+z) (redshift correction, 2026-07-02).
